degraded_reason: Nested orchestrator subagent could not access reviewer subagent tooling; parent executed one selected bead and used two parent-spawned Codex reviewer subagents.
review_blocker_summary: eino-stream-fidelity-reviewer requested changes because WithTools cloned scripted state and could replay the same turn across bound wrappers; fixed by sharing state while keeping wrapper-local tools.

toolcall-index-stability-reviewer requested changes because encrypted reasoning parts were shallow-copied across replays; fixed by deep-copying Reasoning, StreamingMeta, and Extra with regression coverage.
